description: TVmaze is a television metadata and schedule service with information about shows, episodes, people, networks, and air dates. It also provides user account features such as tracking watched episodes and followed shows.
summary: TVmaze exposes two HTTP APIs: a free public REST API at https://api.tvmaze.com and an authenticated user API at https://api.tvmaze.com/v1 documented by an OpenAPI spec; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced.
